title: Vulcraft
description: Few collection of mods for vanilla MC server
body:
This modpack is a collection of mods used by me and my friends to play minecraft. Modpack tries to stay as close to vanilla as possible but also tweak areas which we find needs tweaking (falling trees, sleep, chunky). And when we get bored, we can play Bingo.

**Using this on server side will give you following extra features:**
- Don't need everyone to [Sleep](https://modrinth.com/datapack/sleep) to pass night time
- See server map using [Bluemap](https://modrinth.com/plugin/bluemap) via browser
- Cut down trees fast using [Falling Tree](https://modrinth.com/mod/fallingtree)
- Speak with buddies using [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat)
- ~~Have fun by playing Bingo using [Yet Another Bingo](https://modrinth.com/mod/yet-another-minecraft-bingo)~~ **Not present in modpack since version 1.2 (MC 26.1).**
- Share build schematics thanks to [Litematica](https://modrinth.com/mod/litematica)
- [Servux](https://modrinth.com/mod/servux) will provide extra information( e.g. bouding boxes) for [Minihud](https://modrinth.com/mod/minihud)
- Pregen world using [Chunky](https://modrinth.com/plugin/chunky)
- Use armorstands for fun details using [Armor Poser](https://modrinth.com/mod/armor-poser) and/or [Armor Statuses Datapack](https://modrinth.com/datapack/armor-statues-datapack)
- [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium) to optimize Minecraft a bit

**Using this on client side will give you following extra features:**
- Schematics to help you build thanks to [Litematica](https://modrinth.com/mod/litematica)
- [Minihud](https://modrinth.com/mod/minihud) will show you a bit extra information without the need to dig into F3 all the time
- Tweakeroo will provide various client side tweaks (hand restock, hotbar swap/cycle, flexible/fast block placement etc)
- [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium) to optimize Minecraft a bit
- Speak with buddies using [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat)
